Affiliate disclosure
Some links on this site may be affiliate links. If you buy through them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Recommendations are based on documented features, public information and stated use cases, not on payment alone. Sponsored placements are clearly marked.

Local tool · No email required

Small Business Cyber Stack Recommender

A local, no-email tool to identify the minimum security stack a small business should evaluate first.

No email required. This tool runs in your browser and does not submit personal data.

Languages: English · Français · Español · Deutsch
